case_title: OPORTUN, INC. VS. MONICA R POCASANGRE

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT POCASANGRE, MONICA R $2,122.60 PRINCIPAL, $100.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,222.60 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-08-2020 - JUDGMENT.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,122.69 FILED BY OPORTUN, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT POCASANGRE, MONICA R ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-08-2020 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$50.00) SERVED NOV-25-2019, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT POCASANGRE, MONICA R
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.) FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC.
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT POCASANGRE, MONICA R

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-08-2020 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-08-2020 BY A. JAMES ROBERTSON II. PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY LUPE ACEVEDO LEGAL COLLECTION SPEICALIST. DEFENDANT MONICA R. POCASANGRE IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)
